tests.name: shows correct user name in header
redirects to login when session expires
tests.message:
AssertionError: expected '/dashboard' to equal '/login'

The application navigated to '/dashboard' but the test expected a redirect to '/login' after the session token expired.
tests.trace:
AssertionError: expected '/dashboard' to equal '/login'
    at Context.<anonymous> (cypress/e2e/dashboard.cy.js:34:30)
    at callFn (cypress/support/runner.js:288:21)
    at Test.Runnable.run (cypress/support/runner.js:272:7)
    at next (cypress/support/runner.js:444:14)

tests.name: exports report as PDF
tests.message:
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'blob')

The PDF download handler returned undefined instead of a Blob. The export endpoint may not be returning the expected content-type.

    at downloadPDF (src/utils/export.js:45:23)
    at HTMLButtonElement.<anonymous> (src/pages/Dashboard.jsx:112:5)

tests.name: displays empty state for new user
pagination navigates to next page
tests.message:

Clicking 'Next page' did not advance the table to the second page of results.
tests.trace:
AssertionError: expected 'Item #1' to equal 'Item #11'
    at Context.<anonymous> (cypress/e2e/dashboard.cy.js:123:42)
    at callFn (cypress/support/runner.js:288:21)

tests.name: search filters table results
tests.message:
AssertionError: expected 0 items but table shows 100 items

Searching for the string 'xyz123_no_match' did not filter the table; all 100 records are still visible.
tests.trace:
AssertionError: expected 100 to equal 0
    at Context.<anonymous> (cypress/e2e/dashboard.cy.js:156:38)
